item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pad krapow, a Bangkok classic we all know and love: stir-fried pork served with rice and a fried egg. (4+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Pad krapow with tofu, served with rice and a fried egg. (4+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chili fries: beef chili con carne on chipotle-spiced fries, topped with melted cheese and parsley. Served with avocado crème, crème fraîche, chilli sauce and pico de gallo. (6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Vegetarian chili fries: chili sin carne made with pea protein on chipotle-spiced fries, topped with melted cheese and parsley. Served with avocado crème, crème fraîche, chilli sauce and pico de gallo. (6+11+15)
